source.source_table: SNAP Payment Error Rates, Fiscal Year 2025
source.extraction_method: Share computed from official release table rows
source.method_notes: Computed as 43 jurisdictions with total payment error rates at or above 6.0 percent divided by 53 jurisdictions in the FY2025 SNAP QC payment error rate release, dated June 24, 2026.

label: United States FY2025 rate FNS SNAP jurisdictions at or above 6 percent payment error threshold [FNS SNAP Payment Error Rates FY2025]
